headline: Viral CEO Big Arch Moment Tests McDonald’s Pricing And Traffic Story
summary: McDonald's (NYSE:MCD) saw a viral surge in attention after a video of its CEO eating the new Big Arch burger circulated widely on social media. The clip coincided with strong early sales for the Big Arch burger and a visible rise in brand chatter among customers. Rival chains quickly leaned into their own marketing pushes, signaling that the Big Arch launch is influencing competitive behavior across the sector. For investors watching NYSE:MCD at a share price of $326.65, this viral moment...
